creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
It’s the perfect time to go on a picnic in Dubai. 
📍Creek Park
🎟️ 5 AED 
🌳 Best time to go is on weekday mornings when it’s peaceful and less crowded. There’s a designated bbq area, several playgrounds, a bike rental station, and a few food stalls. 

Tag your picnic buddies!

transcription.text: I wanna take you somewhere, so you know I care But it's so cold and I don't know where
